title: Creamy Mediterranean Pasta Bake
description: A rich and satisfying pasta bake loaded with the flavors of the Mediterranean. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Cook the pasta al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tbsp of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the Mediterranean Blend and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cream cheese and stir until smooth.
Add the cooked pasta and stir until well coated.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish.
If using shirataki noodles, add them on top of the pasta mixture.
If using feta cheese, crumble it on top of the pasta mixture.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, until golden brown and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
